nodes.label: Dragit app logo SVG — 768×768 icon depicting a drag-and-drop gesture: two circular nodes (one indigo/purple rgb(101,100,219) at top, one coral/pink rgb(239,118,122) at bottom-left) connected by a diagonal coral stroke, plus a large purple curved arc suggesting movement. End-caps and shadows use darker variants of each color (dark maroon rgb(184,96,99) and dark indigo rgb(74,74,159)). The overall composition conveys dragging a git item from one position to another, matching the 'dragit' git GUI application theme.
